title: Add AI-Ministries Image Generator to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: AI-Ministries joins the garden
gist.blurb: The AI-Ministries Image Generator just sprouted in our community greenhouse. Another beautiful app built on Pollinations!
gist.summary: Added the AI-Ministries Image Generator to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore the AI-Ministries Image Generator in the Pollinations app gallery.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot in a cozy greenhouse setting. The robot is holding a glowing picture frame to represent the new image generator app, while Polly admires it. Lots of lush plants and lime green accents.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, hovering inside a lush digital greenhouse with code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) pots. A cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holds up a glowing picture frame showing a beautiful landscape. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, hovering inside a lush digital greenhouse with code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) pots. A cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holds up a glowing picture frame showing a beautiful landscape. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
